message:
feat(web): add gateway proxy configuration for dev server

Configures Vite dev server to proxy API and WebSocket requests:

Proxy rules:
- /api/* → VITE_GATEWAY_TARGET (default: http://127.0.0.1:3000)
- /ws/* → Same target with WebSocket upgrade support

Environment variable:
- VITE_GATEWAY_TARGET: Override gateway URL for local development

This eliminates CORS issues during development by proxying requests
through Vite to the gateway server, matching production routing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
